zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes of Dunbar於1162年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴時，她的父親Edgar of Dunbar11159歲，母親Alice Greystoke48歲。她與Anselm Le Fleming在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes of Dunbar was born in 1162, in Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Edgar of Dunbar, was 11159 and her mother, Alice Greystoke, was 48. She married Anselm Le Fleming in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. She died in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Anselm Le Fleming à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Elle est décédée à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes of Dunbarが1162年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンダンバーで生まれた時，父Edgar of Dunbarは11159歳，母Alice Greystokeは48歳であった。イギリスイギリスウエストモーランドでAnselm Le Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes of Dunbar(이)가 1162년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edgar of Dunbar(은)는 11159세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Greystoke(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 Anselm Le Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes of Dunbar родилась в 1162 г. в местности дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edgar of Dunbar было 11159 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Greystoke, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anselm Le Fleming в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Она умерла в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
